FR-001.title: In-flight derivation treats a history-recorded step completion as settled despite a lagging status

FR-004.title: Reconciler moves a lagging in-progress status forward to the step's settled status

FR-007.title: Fold-back applies a real capability delta block to the living spec at completion

FR-008.title: Fold-back reports the single reason that applied, never an OR-string

FR-009.title: Fold-back surfaces an actionable signal when capabilities loaded but no delta block

context: constraint: settle is forward-only, never writes terminal completed
intent: Close the pipeline loop so finishing tasks unlocks the panel and completing a feature folds its changes back into the living spec
expectations: does not auto-synthesize delta blocks from ordinary requirements
does not change specify-time living-spec reading
approach: Make the viewer's in-flight derivation resilient so a recorded step completion settles the step even when the top-level status lags; add a forward-only reconciler settle that heals the on-disk status; and make fold-back name the exact outcome plus an actionable loaded-but-no-delta signal.

decisions.decision: Check history completion before status in isStepInFlight
decisions.why: The footer already offers the forward action when tasks is complete in history; only the status-derived stepInFlight flag suppresses it, so fixing the flag is the minimal surface-agnostic fix
decisions.rejected: Only fixing the hook to flip status (the hook does not always fire; the reader must not trust a laggable field)

decisions.decision: Move fold-back reason strings into fold_living_spec and drop the OR-string
decisions.why: Each early-return can then name the one condition that fired, and the no-delta branch can surface loaded capabilities
decisions.rejected: Auto-synthesizing delta blocks from ordinary requirements (risks writing fabricated content into the durable record)

plan.summary: Reader-resilient in-flight derivation + defensive reconciler settle + exact-reason fold-back
plan.key_finding: The footer catalog already offers the forward action; only the status-derived stepInFlight flag locks it

tasks.summary: 12 tasks across 2 P1 stories (viewer/reconciler + fold-back) plus polish; waves marked

T001.did: Reorder isStepInFlight to settle a step from a recorded completion before consulting status

T002.did: Add forward-only reconciler settle: lagging in-progress status moves to settled form when history shows the step complete; never implement

T003.did: Compute FooterActions stepInFlight via resilient isStepInFlight, not status alone

T004.did: Status-settles eval: tasking + tasks-complete history reads settled; genuinely-running stays in flight

T005.did: Reconciler-settle eval: tasking->ready-to-implement; running left alone; implement never promoted

T006.did: Fold names exact reason per early-return; actionable loaded-but-no-delta signal

T007.did: Drop generic OR-string; fold owns its message

T008.did: Fold-back-writes + exact-reason evals (delta folds; loaded-no-delta actionable; disabled/off)

T009.did: after_tasks settles status to ready-to-implement regression lock

T010.did: Rewrote in-flight derivation order in viewer-states.md: a recorded completion settles the step over a lagging status

T011.did: speckit-extension CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + README note for exact-reason fold-back and loaded-but-no-delta signal

T012.did: Verified: npm test 1721 pass, jest reconciler/stepInFlight, shape-parity OK, python 446 pass

last_action: all 12 tasks done — 1721 jest + 446 python green, shape parity OK
